channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-847] Merge some quota patches from Orion to 2.2
item.description:
It would be great to merge the following patches in lustre 2.2:
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1613
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1380
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,1382
item.summary: Merge some quota patches from Orion to 2.2

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
http://review.whamcloud.com/#change,2794
back port to b2_1

Integrated in lustre-b1_8 » x86_64,server,el5,inkernel #186
LU-847 quota: client retrieve quota usage directly (Revision b7a894819868636e8212b1948cc486a2f43e9c7c)

Result = SUCCESS
Johann Lombardi : b7a894819868636e8212b1948cc486a2f43e9c7c
Files :

  • lustre/llite/dir.c

Files :

  • lustre/tests/sanity-quota.sh
I have no idea why Gerrit thinks that there is a dependency with this patch (which is even on lustre-dev).
It would be OK to land these patches I think, but it looks like they need to be rebased since they depend on a patch that was abandoned.
